member.name: T:HMSService.Application.Abstractions.INotificationHelper
member.summary: Routes HMS domain events to CommunicationService (never sends SMTP/SMS directly).

member.name: T:HMSService.Application.DTOs.Appointments.AppointmentResponseDto
member.summary: Appointment returned by the API (never expose domain entities).

member.name: T:HMSService.Application.DTOs.Appointments.CreateAppointmentDto
member.summary: Payload to create an OPD appointment.

member.name: T:HMSService.Application.Integration.LabInvoiceSummaryDto
member.summary: Subset of LMS lab invoice for HMS billing / payment tracking views.

member.name: T:HMSService.Application.Options.HmsNotificationIntegrationOptions
member.summary: Maps HMS flows to CommunicationService reference data (configure per tenant seed).

member.name: T:HMSService.Application.Services.Extended.HmsCrudServiceBase`5
member.summary: Generic CRUD for HMS extended entities (tenant + optional facility scoped via ).

member.name: P:HMSService.Application.Services.Extended.HmsCrudServiceBase`5.RequiresFacilityId
member.summary: When true, Create requires and assigns it to the entity.

member.name: M:HMSService.Application.Services.Extended.HmsCrudServiceBase`5.IsEntityInFacilityScope(`0)
member.summary: When facility is present on the request, facility-scoped entities must match it.

member.name: T:HMSService.Application.Services.Extended.HmsDocumentNumberHelper
member.summary: Generates human-readable document numbers for HMS headers (prescriptions, bills, visits).
